subcodes.first_line: O servant of God! Thy letter was received. Praise be to God, it was a clear proof that the friends in that region are firm in the Cause [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده الهی نامه شما رسید الحمد لله دلیل جلیل بود که یاران آنسامان مستقیم بر امر
subcodes.subjects: @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
